title: azanza lampas
intro: Azanza lampas, also known as Azanza garckeana, is a tropical plant species native to West Africa, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant's leaves, bark, and roots are used in traditional medicine, and it is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Azanza lampas include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce cholesterol levels. Azanza lampas can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, making it a versatile herbal remedy used in traditional medicine.
